'''Endorian snails''' were tiny creatures with orange/white coiled shells that lived in grassy hill areas on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]].

==Behind the scenes==
These tiny creatures can be found in some regions of Endor in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', but contrary to other creatures in this game, players can't target or attack them nor otherwise interact with these snails.

==Appearances==
